prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
This page contains the END of "Item 7A. Quantitative and Qualitative Disclosures About Market Risk". The next section is "Item 8. Financial Statements and Supplementary Data".
Transcribe VERBATIM the last 5 lines of "Item 7A" body text before the next item begins:
if the "Item 8" heading appears on this page, take the 5 lines just before it; otherwise Item 7A continues to the bottom, so take the last 5 lines of the page (ignore running headers, page numbers, footers).
Respond with ONLY a JSON object: {"lines": ["line 1", "line 2", ...]}
